title: B.Tech CSE
description: B.Tech CSE provides comprehensive engineering education with strong theoretical foundation and practical skills. The program includes modern labs, industry collaborations, research opportunities, and placement assistance. Graduates are equipped for careers in core industries, IT, research, and higher studies.

title: B.Tech CSE (Hons.) with specialization in AI & ML
bullets: Advanced AI and machine learning algorithms
description: B.Tech CSE (Hons.) with specialization in AI & ML focuses on cutting-edge artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies. Students learn deep learning, neural networks, computer vision, NLP, and AI ethics. The program includes hands-on projects, industry collaborations, and exposure to real-world AI applications in various domains.

title: B.Tech CSE (Hons.) with specialization in AI & DS
description: B.Tech CSE (Hons.) in AI & DS equips you with advanced AI and machine learning skills.  Explore computer vision, NLP, neural networks, and ethical AI practices via hands-on labs, collaborative industry projects, and applications in diverse sectors.

title: B.Tech CSE (Hons.) with specialization in Cyber Security
description: B.Tech CSE (Hons.) with specialization in Cyber Security prepares students for careers in cybersecurity and information security. Topics include ethical hacking, cryptography, network security, malware analysis, and security operations. Students gain practical experience through labs and industry certifications.

title: B.Tech CSE (Hons.) with specialization in Generative AI
bullets: Deep learning & Neural networks for content creation
description: B.Tech CSE (Hons.) in Generative AI builds expertise in innovative AI tools for creating text, images, and media. Master generative models, neural networks, NLP, computer vision, and ethical AI through practical labs, industry collaborations, and real-world projects across creative domains.

title: B.Tech CSE AI & DS
bullets: Advanced AI algorithms and machine learning techniques
description: B.Tech CSE AI & DS program delivers cutting-edge artificial intelligence and machine learning training. description: B.Sc Aeronautics offers a robust program in aviation science, covering aerodynamics, aircraft systems, navigation, and safety protocols. title: B.Tech Biotechnology
description: B.Tech Biotechnology delivers in-depth training in genetic engineering, bioprocessing, microbiology, and bioinformatics. Features cutting-edge labs, industry partnerships, hands-on research projects, and career guidance to prepare graduates for biotech firms, pharmaceuticals, research institutes, and advanced studies.

title: B.Tech Civil Engineering
description: B.Tech Civil Engineering builds expertise in structural analysis, geotechnics, water resources, and sustainable infrastructure. title: B.Tech Civil Engineering with specialization in GIS & Remote Sensing
bullets: Remote sensing labs with satellite data
description: B.Tech Civil Engineering in GIS & Remote Sensing integrates structural engineering with geospatial tech, surveying, and earth observation. Our program features high-tech labs, collaborative industry projects, research in urban mapping, and placement aid for roles in infrastructure, disaster management, and environmental consulting.

title: B.Tech Civil Engineering with specialization in Construction Management
description: B.Tech Civil Engineering with specialization in Construction Management offers thorough training in project execution, cost estimation, quality control, and site supervision. title: M.Tech Structural Engineering
description: M.Tech Structural Engineering offers quality education with focus on both theoretical knowledge and practical skills. The program prepares students for successful careers through industry exposure, internships, and placement support.

description: B.Tech Electrical & Computer Engineering provides comprehensive engineering education with strong theoretical foundation and practical skills. title: B.Tech ECE with optional specialization in Embedded Sytems and Robotics (ESR)
